title: Alsancak Art Trail
description: Spend a themed day in Izmir: visit Arkas Sanat Alsancak, stroll along Kıbrıs Şehitleri Boulevard, and stop by Dalga Alsancak.
notes: Admire the fine art exhibitions in a Levantine mansion.
Wander through the lively streets of Alsancak.
Grab a good espresso in a side alley.
Free public restrooms are available nearby.
